content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I found no code-level regressions attributable to this patch. The working diff for this run contains only `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` changes; there are no edits in the implementation files targeted by this contract (`src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`) to review. If intended lifecycle improvements were expected here, this appears to be a metadata-only commit and not a functional implementation change.

## Amendments

None.
